title: 目標達成の後に・アタシの戦場！

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
My training arc is complete! Trainer and I have
decided that sprints and miles are the best races
for me!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But Trainer feels bad because that means it'll be
harder for me to race against Yaeno and the
others. After all, they mostly run in mid and long
distances...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
It's not that I don't want to run with everyone, but
I know I've got to become an awesome racer if I
want to run in hot-blooded races!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
For now, I'll do everything I can to become the
top racer in sprints and miles! Next up, I'm taking
on a graded sprint called the Swan Stakes!
